nodes.name: q7.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest partial defining the materialized view for ClickHouse benchmark streaming query 7.

nodes.name: q8.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest partial defining the materialized view for ClickHouse benchmark streaming query 8.

nodes.name: q9.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest partial defining the materialized view for ClickHouse benchmark streaming query 9.

nodes.name: check_slt_coverage.py
nodes.summary: Python tool that analyzes SLT test coverage by scanning CI scripts, tracking include-file relationships, and reporting uncovered test directories and partial files.

nodes.name: read_coverageignore
nodes.summary: Reads the .coverageignore file and returns a list of glob patterns for files to exclude from coverage analysis.

nodes.name: find_all_slt_files
nodes.summary: Discovers all .slt and .slt.part files in the e2e_test directory, optionally including ignored files.

nodes.name: extract_slt_patterns_from_script
nodes.summary: Parses CI shell scripts to extract risedev-slt command invocations and glob patterns referencing SLT files.

nodes.name: find_included_files
nodes.summary: Builds include and included-by maps by scanning SLT files for 'include' directives and resolving file paths.

nodes.name: group_by_directory
nodes.summary: Groups a list of file paths by their parent directory for directory-level coverage reporting.

nodes.name: analyze_uncovered_directories
nodes.summary: Analyzes which directories have no covered SLT files and computes per-directory coverage ratios.

nodes.name: propagate_coverage_through_includes
nodes.summary: Propagates coverage transitively through SLT include relationships, marking .slt.part files as covered when included by a covered .slt file.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main entry point that orchestrates coverage analysis: discovers files, parses CI scripts, computes covered/uncovered sets, and outputs a detailed JSON coverage report.

nodes.name: common.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script providing common utility functions and environment setup shared across e2e test command wrappers.

nodes.name: deltalake_prepare
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper script that prepares Delta Lake environment for e2e connector tests.

nodes.name: internal_table.mjs
nodes.summary: Node.js/zx script for querying RisingWave internal tables (backfill state, compaction status) during e2e tests.

nodes.name: psql
nodes.summary: Executes a SQL query against RisingWave via psql and returns the result as an array of CSV-split strings.

nodes.name: select_internal_table
nodes.summary: Queries all internal tables matching a given job name and table type, returning their contents in parallel.

nodes.name: mysql
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper script providing mysql CLI access with preset RisingWave test credentials.

nodes.name: psql_validate.py
nodes.summary: Python utility for executing SQL queries against RisingWave and validating output against expected templates with wildcard support.

nodes.name: format_results
nodes.summary: Fetches and formats query result rows as a tabular string with column headers and aligned widths.

nodes.name: get_raw_results
nodes.summary: Returns raw query results as a flat list of string-converted values for regex-based validation.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that connects to RisingWave, executes a SQL query, and validates results against expected output patterns, exiting non-zero on mismatch.

nodes.name: pulsar_util.py
nodes.summary: Python utility providing Pulsar topic management operations (create, drop, produce, consume, compact) used by e2e connector tests.

nodes.name: PulsarCat
nodes.summary: Client class wrapping the Pulsar Python SDK for topic lifecycle management including creation, deletion, message production/consumption, and compaction operations.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for pulsar_util that dispatches subcommands (produce, consume, compact, etc.) to PulsarCat methods.

nodes.name: python
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper ensuring the correct Python interpreter is used for e2e test helper scripts.

nodes.name: python3
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper ensuring python3 is available for e2e test helper scripts.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the e2e test command wrapper scripts explaining their purpose and usage in system tests.

nodes.name: risectl
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper for the risectl CLI tool used in e2e tests for cluster management operations.

nodes.name: sparksql
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper providing Spark SQL CLI access for e2e connector integration tests.

nodes.name: sr_register
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper for registering Avro/Protobuf schemas in the Schema Registry during e2e tests.

nodes.name: expected.txt
nodes.summary: Expected output file for the COPY command e2e tests used for result validation.

nodes.name: gen_data.slt
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest for the COPY command generating test data and verifying ingestion correctness.

nodes.name: create_graph.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest partial for setting up streaming graph objects used by dashboard e2e tests.

nodes.name: drop_graph.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest partial that tears down streaming graph objects after dashboard e2e tests.

nodes.name: graph.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for dashboard streaming graph creation, querying, and visualization correctness.

nodes.name: alter_compaction_group.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ALTER TABLE compaction group assignment DDL operations.

nodes.name: alter_owner.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ALTER TABLE/VIEW/MATERIALIZED VIEW OWNER TO DDL operations.

nodes.name: alter_parallelism.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ALTER TABLE parallelism configuration DDL operations.

nodes.name: alter_rename.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ALTER TABLE/VIEW/INDEX RENAME TO DDL operations.
